description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a central open area that appears to include a pool or water feature. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored concrete or stucco and large glass panels, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The larger volume likely contains the main living spaces, while the smaller volume could serve as a garage or guest suite. Expansive windows and sliding glass doors are visible, maximizing natural light and offering views of the outdoor spaces. The property is set on a broad, flat base, suggesting a spacious lot with integrated outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with two main rectangular volumes, large glass panels, and a central pool or water feature, set on a spacious, minimalist lot.
description_view_0: From this side view, the house's elongated layout, flat roofs, and the central pool or water feature are clearly visible, along with the main and secondary volumes.
description_view_1: This end view highlights the depth of the main volume, the smaller secondary structure, and the pool area, emphasizing the house's linear arrangement.
description_view_2: The opposite side view shows the long, flat-roofed main structure, the connecting open area, and the smaller volume at the far end.
description_view_3: From this end, the pool or water feature is prominent, with both the main and secondary volumes visible, showcasing the house's symmetry and outdoor integration.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with large glass door, no visible steps, and a flat overhang
